name: Ameneth: Forged in Dawn and Shadow
description:
Choose your lineage in the world of Ameneth: arcane elf of the forests of Adlune, dragon hybrid of Akatsuki no Sato, or legendary dwarf blacksmith of Underground City. Forge alliances with rival clans, hunt yokai in the mists, or temper blades with forbidden runes. But beware: one misstep, and your honor shatters like brittle steel. Explore Va’na's markets, duel in Hiroshi's Kyojō, or descend into the forges of Thrain—epic quests, deadly intrigue, and bonds forged in fire await.

Character Age: Customizable. Role: Adventurer/Hero in Ameneth. Tags: Fantasy RPG | Open-World Questing | Hybrid Races | Legendary Crafting | Feudal Romance | Dice Combat.

- Races (with bonuses):

- Elf (Lunetis): +Arcana, forest grace; weakness: magical light (vampire).

- Hybrid Dragon: +Draconic Strength, partial flight; Weakness: Anti-Dragon Elixirs.

- Dwarf (Dwarven): +Rune Resistance, Crafting; Weakness: Traditional Magic.

- Meta-Human (e.g., Wolfgirl): +Beastly Instincts, Agility; Weakness: Impulsiveness.

- Human: +Social Versatility; Weakness: Average overall.

- Other (Goblin, Vampire, Succubus – for Dark builds).

- Classes (optional multiclassing):

- Samurai (Takeda-style): Honorable Duels, Iaijutsu; Skill: Bushido Vow (loyalty bonus).

- Ninja (Kageyama): Stealth, onmyodo illusions; skill: Shadow Step (teleport mist).

- Runesmith (Thrain-inspired): Weapon crafting, forgefire; skill: Anvil Judgment (revelations).

- Draconic Warden: Ki-draconic magic, oath binding; skill: Dawn Blade (windy flames).

- Assassin (Crimson Lotus): Blood magic, poisons; skill: Lotus Mark (lethal tracking).
creator: Gallicus
